prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第144名持续上升至2026年第87名，排名提升显著，学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；2023年曾因师德师风事件获偏负面评价，2024年转为中性/混合（分数线上升引发关注）；抖音热度排名第32位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，报考关注度呈升温态势；未见明显投档断档记录；学科评估数据中未收录海南大学A-及以上等级学科，该校以农林、法学、经管等为特色，相关专业在内蒙古招生覆盖面较广。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与海南大学物理类招生专业（计算机、软件、电子信息、自动化等）高度契合，吸引高分考生报考；本省2026年物理类考生约110880人，较2025年83716人增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；海南大学位于海南省海口市，对北方考生具有气候和环境吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生占比约0.8%–1.3%，属外省招生中等水平，近年招生人数基本稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15858、2026年计划小幅缩招（-5%）、本省物理类考生大幅增加（+32%）、学校软科排名持续上升及抖音热度较高等因素，竞争总体加剧。，但考生规模暴增和学校声誉提升带来的额外竞争压力使位次需进一步上移。预测2026年理科最低位次约15587名，区间15087–16087名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 16919 → 15995 → 17915 → 24172 → 15858. In 2024, due to adjustments in the examination format, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 24172, but recovered to 15858 in 2025. Overall, there has been considerable fluctuation over the past five years, with a baseline of about 15858 in 2025. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 72 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 75 in 2023, 105 in 2024, and 101 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 96, a reduction of about 5% compared to 2025, representing a slight contraction in enrollment, which theoretically eases competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, a significant improvement, indicating continuously enhancing comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, but in 2024, it turned neutral/mixed (with attention drawn by rising admission scores). It ranks 32nd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, and the attention for applications is warming up. No obvious records of admission cut-off gaps have been observed. In the discipline evaluation data, Hainan University has no disciplines rated A- or above. The university is characterized by agriculture, forestry, law, economics, and management, with related majors having a broad coverage in Inner Mongolia enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronics/information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely matching Hainan University's physics category enrollment majors (computer science, software, electronic information, automation, etc.), attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the province's physics category candidates are approximately 110,880, an increase of about 32% compared to 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Hainan University is located in Haikou, Hainan Province, offering climate and environmental appeal to northern candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 0.8%–1.3%, a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment, with enrollment numbers remaining stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15858, the slight enrollment contraction in 2026 (-5%), the substantial increase in provincial physics category candidates (+32%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the high Douyin popularity, competition is overall intensifying. However, the surge in candidate numbers and the additional competitive pressure from the university's enhanced reputation require the ranking to move further upward. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 15587, with a range of 15087–16087.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 15587, with a range of 15087–16087. For rankings within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly above the upper limit (e.g., within 15000), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors such as computer science, software, and electronic information. For rankings near the lower limit (around 16000), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 majors, with Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Tier 1 majors are mostly IT/electronic information fields with broad employment prospects but intense competition; Tier 3 majors are mostly traditional engineering and agriculture/forestry fields with relatively lower admission difficulty.
